Electromyography (EMG) and Nerve Conduction Studies 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are electromyography (EMG) and nerve conduction studies? 
Electromyography (EMG) and nerve conduction studies are tests that check how well your muscles and the nerves that control them are working. These nerves control your muscles by sending o
